description: An inbound shipment from a supplier arrives with visible damage to the packaging. An agent must file a claim with the freight carrier.

nodes.task_description: The receiving worker notes the damage on the bill of lading when signing for the shipment.

expected_outcome.value: The damage is officially noted upon receipt.

nodes.task_description: Take photos of the damaged shipment.
File a formal freight claim with the carrier, including the photos and an estimate of the value of the damaged goods.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully submits the claim to the carrier.
